translation: By the night as it veils,
urdu: رات کی قسم جب (دن کو) چھپالے

translation: And by the day as it unveils!
urdu: اور دن کی قسم جب چمک اٹھے

translation: And by the Power that created the male and the female!
notes: The deep wisdom inherent in, and the necessity behind, the creation of the male and the female do not but point to that Power being superhuman, absolute and extremely intelligent. The Darwinian theory that this happens without any intelligent power consciously designing it is just nonsense! That theory is nothing but a mortal man’s sheer conjecture, aided and abetted by the Satan, in search of something to negate the overwhelming evidence in the Universe in favour of a Super- intelligent Being consciously creating everything out of nothing.
urdu: اور اس (ذات) کی قسم جس نے نر اور مادہ پیدا کیے

translation: Indeed, your [mankind’s] work is in divergent fields of activity!
urdu: کہ تم لوگوں کی کوششں طرح طرح کی ہے

translation: And, he who gave [things in Allah’s Path] and feared Him,
urdu: تو جس نے (خدا کے رستے میں مال) دیا اور پرہیز گاری کی

translation: And stood firmly by what was good and right,
urdu: اور نیک بات کو سچ جانا

translation: For him shall We make things easy!
urdu: اس کو ہم آسان طریقے کی توفیق دیں گے

translation: And he who was miserly [in giving things in Allah’s Path], and considered that he needed no divine help,
urdu: اور جس نے بخل کیا اور بےپروا بنا رہا

translation: And belied what was good and right,
urdu: اور نیک بات کو جھوٹ سمجھا

translation: For him shall We make things difficult!
urdu: اسے سختی میں پہنچائیں گے

arabic: وَمَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
transliteration: Wama yughnee AAanhu maluhu itha taradda
translation: And his wealth shall avail him not when he drops dead.
urdu: اور جب وہ (دوزخ کے گڑھے میں) گرے گا تو اس کا مال اس کے کچھ کام نہ آئے گا

translation: It is certainly indeed for Us to give the guidance;
urdu: ہمیں تو راہ دکھا دینا ہے

translation: And, certainly indeed, the Dominion over both the Hereafter and the present world is Ours.
urdu: اور آخرت او ردنیا ہماری ہی چیزیں ہیں

translation: I then warn you of the flaming Fire
urdu: سو میں نے تم کو بھڑکتی آگ سے متنبہ کر دیا

translation: None shall burn in it [the Fire] but the wicked person.
urdu: اس میں وہی داخل ہو گا جو بڑا بدبخت ہے

translation: He who belies the Truth and turns away [from it].
urdu: جس نے جھٹلایا اور منہ پھیرا

translation: And, he will be distanced from it [Fire] who fears Allah,
urdu: اور جو بڑا پرہیزگار ہے وہ (اس سے) بچا لیا جائے گا

translation: He who spends his wealth [on others] to keep himself pure.
urdu: جو مال دیتا ہے تاکہ پاک ہو

arabic: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعۡمَةٖ تُجۡزَىٰٓ
transliteration: Wama liahadin AAindahu min niAAmatin tujza
translation: – And he has none with him to be recompensed of favours received –
urdu: اور (اس لیے) نہیں (دیتا کہ) اس پر کسی کا احسان (ہے) جس کا وہ بدلہ اتارتا ہے

translation: And he spends for nothing but to seek the pleasure of his Lord, the High:
urdu: بلکہ اپنے خداوند اعلیٰ کی رضامندی حاصل کرنے کے لیے دیتا ہے

translation: And such persons, certainly, shall in time be well-pleased.
urdu: اور وہ عنقریب خوش ہو جائے گا
